ddls:
CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user on the social media platform */,
  "cover_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the influencer's cover picture */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the influencer */,
  "handle" TEXT /* The influencer's unique handle or username */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the influencer */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the influencer has */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the influencer's account is verified */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes received by the influencer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the influencer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the influencer */,
  "influencer_type" TEXT /* Type of influencer (e.g., beauty, fitness, gaming) */,
  "average_engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate of the influencer */,
  "total_content" INTEGER /* Total number of content pieces created by the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last active on the platform */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user on the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the platform was launched */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the platform */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for integrating with the platform */,
  "authentication_process" TEXT /* Authentication process for the platform's API */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand initiating the campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Primary objective of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "content_requirements" TEXT /* Content requirements for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the brand operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "brand_category" TEXT /* Category of the brand (e.g., fashion, beauty) */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_campaigns" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the influencer in the campaign */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment to the influencer for the campaign */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the influencer's contract with the brand */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the influencer's contract with the brand */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date by which the influencer must deliver the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id", "campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_campaigns_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_campaigns_payment_status FOREIGN KEY ("payment_status") REFERENCES payment_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement metric (e.g., followers, likes) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate based on the metric value and total followers */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_metric_type FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., reach, engagement) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "reach_rate" REAL /* Reach rate of the campaign */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the campaign's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_metric_type FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment status */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the campaign (e.g., bank transfer, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)
